description: Coalition of nationalist political parties founded by [Mohammad Mossadegh](/people/mohammad-mossadegh) in 1949. Led the oil nationalization movement and supported [Mossadegh](/people/mohammad-mossadegh)'s government (1951–1953). Reconstituted as the Second National Front (1960) and Third National Front (1964). The [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) split from it in 1961. Members including [Karim Sanjabi](/people/karim-sanjabi) served in the post-revolution provisional government, but the organization was marginalized by the Islamic Republic.
editorial_notes: Founded by Mossadegh. Parent organization of FMI.
